'''Dorset Konnair''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who flew an [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wing]] as part of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Edor Crespin]]'s training group [[Blue Squadron (New Republic)|Blue Squadron]], alongside what would become [[Wraith Squadron]], on [[Folor]].

==Biography==
When the [[Zsinj]] [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Implacable (Star Destroyer)/Legends|''Implacable'']] [[Battle of Folor|attacked]] the base, Konnair and her wingman [[Tetengo Noor]] along with Wraiths [[Kell Tainer]] and [[Hohass Ekwesh]] were sent to scout out [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Apwar Trigit]]'s forces before the full squadron attack. Although overly confident of the speed of their A-Wings Konnair as [[Blue Nine/Legends|Blue Nine]] and her [[Wingmate/Legends|wingman]] [[Tetengo Noor]] ([[Blue Ten/Legends|Blue Ten]]) lost the race to their assigned scouting point to the Wraith's [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-Wings]], claiming they had to go back to the base to retrieve Noor's dinner. Konnair subsequently helped fleeing transports buy time to escape by impersonating the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] through flying in close to her wingman while continually shifting shield strength to hide the sensor profile of their A-wings.

Later she played the role of [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]] using an encryption which was known that Zsinj's forces had already cracked. This ploy succeeded in luring away the capital ship. Later in the hunt for Zsinj, Konnair was [[Polearm Squadron|Polearm]] Seven in the A-Wing Squadron assigned to the ''[[Mon Remonda]]''.

Konnair was from Coruscant, and had multiple tattoos in shades of blue, most noticeably a starflare [[Tattoo/Legends|tattoo]] covering one eye. She was often quiet at pilot gatherings due to perceived mistrust from other New Republic pilots towards Coruscant natives. She survived the final battle against [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'']] and received a commendation at the end of the campaign, after which she and the remnants of her squadron were reassigned to Coruscant for rebuilding.
